owner_operator_stated: Dr. Michael Vold, DDS, President (per RocketReach business profile and multiple physician directories)
notes: Address (1535 Lake Cook Rd Ste 602, Northbrook IL 60062) matches exactly across BBB, Healthgrades, YellowPages and other directories, confirming the official domain is northbrookcourtdental.com and the owner is Dr. Michael Vold. HOWEVER the record's phone (847) 498-4415 does NOT belong to this practice -- that number actually resolves to a different, unrelated practice ('North Suburban Dental of Northbrook,' 450 Skokie Blvd, a different address entirely) per direct search. Because the address independently and strongly corroborates this practice at this location under the same name/owner, this looks like a vendor phone-field data error rather than an actual successor/takeover at 1535 Lake Cook Rd, so ownership_conflict was NOT applied -- flagging for human review instead. vendor_website_hint 'Essentiallypuredental.com' is unrelated/wrong. The practice's own site (northbrookcourtdental.com, www/non-www, http/https all tried) returned ECONNREFUSED on every fetch attempt -- appears to be down, so roster/hiring could not be confirmed from the site itself; third-party directories only confirm Dr. Vold as President/owner.

owner_operator_stated: Family owned and operated for two generations; Dr. Theodore J. Constantine, DDS (Loyola University Chicago, 1989) is the founding-generation owner/principal dentist (per indexed content from constantinedentalcenter.com and directory listings)
notes: Address (1501 Shermer Rd, Northbrook IL 60062) and phone ((847) 272-6466) both match exactly, confirmed directly via WebMD's practice page, corroborating constantinedentalcenter.com as the practice's own site. The official domain's pages (homepage, meet-the-team) returned ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID on automated fetch, so roster detail was sourced from WebMD's mirrored practice listing instead of the raw site; search snippets from the official domain (page title 'Meet The Team | Northbrook, IL | Constantine Family and Aesthetic Dental') confirm the site is actively indexed and presumed live for normal browsers, just inaccessible to this fetch tool due to a cert misconfiguration. No careers/hiring page found. Practice appears family-owned (2 generations), no DSO/chain affiliation found in evidence gathered.

owner_operator_stated: Two distinct entities found at the same building (135 W Johnson St, Palatine IL 60067): (1) the named record entity, Dr. Paul Russell A. Nicotra, DDS Ltd -- per Healthgrades he currently practices at Ste 3, phone (847) 358-4700, which is a DIFFERENT phone than the record's phone; (2) the record's exact phone (847) 776-1202 currently resolves to a different practice, Kotsiopoulos Peter J DDS PC, Ste 6, same building, per direct search of that phone number. It is unclear whether this reflects an actual phone/location handoff between the two dentists or a vendor data error assigning the wrong phone digits to the Nicotra record.
notes: SUCCESSOR/CONFLICT per rule 2: the record's phone (847) 776-1202 at 135 W Johnson St, Palatine no longer belongs to 'Dr Paul Russell A Nicotra DDS Ltd' -- it currently resolves to Kotsiopoulos Peter J DDS PC (Ste 6) in the same multi-suite building. Dr. Nicotra's own current listing (Healthgrades) places him at Ste 3 in the same building with a different phone, (847) 358-4700. No dedicated website domain was found for either entity -- only aggregator/directory pages (Yelp, Healthgrades, WebMD, CareCredit, Wellness.com, FindATopDoc) -- so no site could be corroborated as the practice's own. vendor_website_hint 'Drkonishi.com' is a clear name mismatch and was not pursued further given the phone conflict already substantiated (search budget prioritized confirming the conflict).

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Michael Subtelny, DMD recently acquired the practice from Dr. Michael Unti, who had owned Palatine Complete Dental since 1992 (practice has operated 50+ years total); stated directly on the practice's own website.
notes: Address (235 N Northwest Hwy, Palatine IL 60067) and phone ((847) 359-7520) both match exactly on the practice's own site (fetched directly, live). The site itself discloses a recent internal ownership transition -- Dr. Michael Subtelny (DMD) recently bought the practice from longtime owner Dr. Michael Unti (owned since 1992) -- but the entity name 'Palatine Complete Dental,' address, and phone are all unchanged, so this is an internal practice-sale disclosed by the practice itself, NOT an ownership_conflict/successor mismatch under rule 2 (no different named entity now occupies this address/phone). Only Dr. Subtelny is currently listed as a dentist; no careers/hiring page found.
